{{Quote|I understand you have schedule to keep. It will only take a moment to test your ship and cargo for contamination, then you can continue on your way.|Milo Phineas|<ref name="DS" />}}
'''Milo Phineas''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who worked for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] as a naval officer. Phineas was a former [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who later went to work for the CSA. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], he was part of the forces led by Fleet [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Baruche Sloane]] assigned to seize the [[Kalinda system/Legends|Kalinda system]], where he served as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] aboard the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Enforce]]''.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=Den of Spies|book=Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)}} {{1st}}
